_comment: Golden file for the PSR-1 smoothing test. spreadCases pin the Fabric-worked-example amortisation (a 1-CU-hour = 3600 CU-second background job spreads to 1.25 LCU per timepoint across 2,880 timepoints). decideCases pin every four-stage-throttle boundary.

spreadCases.name: 1-CU-hour background over F2 amortises to 1.25 LCU/timepoint (Learn worked example)
600 LCU interactive over 10 timepoints = 60 LCU/timepoint (exactly the F2 per-timepoint cap)

decideCases.name: 5 min burst under overage protection → allow (interactive)
15 min sustained over capacity → interactive delayed 20s
65 min over capacity → background still admitted
beyond 24 h of committed capacity → all rejected (background)
beyond 24 h of committed capacity → all rejected (interactive)
